description: Offline-first searchable catalog for VoltanLabs assets, reusable files, source media, previews, and project dependencies.

fieldNotes.id: Stable asset identifier used by the Knowledge Engine and project dependency graph.
fieldNotes.name: Human-readable asset name.
fieldNotes.assetType: Asset category such as image, icon, script, document, template, sprite, audio, data, or design.
fieldNotes.project: Owning VoltanLabs project or studio system.
fieldNotes.description: Short explanation of what the asset is and how it is used.
fieldNotes.license: Known license or project-owned usage note.
fieldNotes.source: Original source, authoring workflow, or repository origin.
fieldNotes.path: Repository path to the canonical asset.
fieldNotes.preview: Preview path when available; may match path for directly viewable files.
fieldNotes.dependencies: Other asset, module, project, or runtime identifiers this asset relies on.
fieldNotes.version: Asset catalog version or asset revision.

assets.name: VoltanLabs Favicon
assets.description: Primary site favicon used by the Studio shell and VoltanLabs web pages.

assets.name: Studio Module Registry Script
assets.description: Central browser-side registry that declares Studio modules for the reusable dashboard renderer.

assets.name: Studio Shell Renderer Script
assets.description: Reusable Studio dashboard renderer that turns module registry entries into shell cards.

assets.name: Knowledge Search Script
assets.description: Lightweight browser-side search layer for Studio Knowledge Engine index records.

assets.name: Studio Knowledge Index
assets.description: JSON index that catalogs Studio modules for offline search and future global indexing.

assets.name: Asset Library Index
assets.description: Primary JSON catalog for searchable VoltanLabs assets and future asset dependency mapping.
assets.source: Seeded from existing Studio foundation files
